title: Disney Princess Christmas Wrapping Paper 3 x 2M Rolls Gift Wrap for Boys or Girls - UK Made
features: Elevate your holiday gifting experience with our Christmas Wrapping Paper set, featuring vibrant designs of beloved characters that will delight children and adults alike.
This set includes three generous rolls, each measuring approximately 2 meters in length, providing a total of 6 meters of high-quality gift wrap.
With a width of approximately 69cm per roll, this wrapping paper is perfectly sized for a variety of presents, ensuring that every gift is beautifully presented.
The stand out design showcases the iconic Disney Princess faces in hanging decorations, making it an ideal choice for fans of Disney, adding a touch of excitement to your holiday celebrations.
Whether you are wrapping gifts for family, friends, or little ones, this festive gift wrap is sure to bring joy and cheer to your Christmas festivities.
